§ Music

Albums that mattered

Not a scrobble feed — a short list of records that earned a permanent hold on my attention. Roughly chronological; lightly annotated.

  • Census Designated
    2025 · Current rotation

    Census Designated

    Jane Remover

    Lives on in the car. The kind of record where production choices keep rearranging themselves on the 20th listen. I keep finding small rooms inside it.
  • Bright Future
    2024 · Grief record

    Bright Future

    Adrianne Lenker

    Recorded live to tape in a cabin, and you can hear the walls. The kind of album that does not help you feel better, just feel it on purpose.
  • Water Made Us
    2023 · Writing soundtrack

    Water Made Us

    Jamila Woods

    Wrote most of the first year at Superhuman to this. Soft enough to not intrude, dense enough to reward attention when you give it.
  • Farm to Table
    2022 · Road trip

    Farm to Table

    Bartees Strange

    A lesson in refusing genre. I play \"Heavy Heart\" the night before hard meetings.
  • Fetch the Bolt Cutters
    2020 · Formative

    Fetch the Bolt Cutters

    Fiona Apple

    The album that taught me percussion is a thought, not an accompaniment. Still unbeaten as a study in what a voice can carry.
  • U.F.O.F.
    2019 · Desert island

    U.F.O.F.

    Big Thief

    The record I reach for when I need the world to slow down by about 20%. Adrianne and Buck, again.
  • Ctrl
    2017 · Kept coming back

    Ctrl

    SZA

    Went in expecting a hit album, left with a slow burn. \"20 Something\" is still the closer.
  • Are We There
    2014 · Moving-city record

    Are We There

    Sharon Van Etten

    Soundtracked a move from London to the Bay. \"Your Love is Killing Me\" did most of the lifting.
  • In Rainbows
    2007 · Formative

    In Rainbows

    Radiohead

    The first album I paid for with my own money, in the pay-what-you-want days. Still finds new ways to be the right record.
  • The Blueprint
    2001 · Formative

    The Blueprint

    Jay-Z

    I was 14, and my older cousin handed me a burned CD. Changed what I thought a record could feel like on headphones.

❦ Forty-odd more on the long list — pruned out of kindness ❦

Or browse everything in one stream ↗
